title: Endovier
summary: A brutal salt-mine prison camp used by Adarlan for forced labor.

title: The King’s Champion
summary: A covert agent chosen to carry out the king’s missions.

title: The Glass Castle
summary: The royal seat in Rifthold, built partly of glass and visible above the city.

title: World-Crossing Thread
summary: A cross-world link that appears only after every required chapter is complete.
